'''Aqualis Base''' or '''Aqualis Baralou Algae Processing Plant #T-18''' was a [[bestrum algae]] harvesting and [[Foodstuff/Legends|food]] processing plant on the planet [[Baralou]]. Officially it was owned by the [[Aqualis Food Conglomerate]]. Unofficially, Aqualis Base was an [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] food production plant. The base was managed by [[Fez Devvol]] and staffed by thirty workers who harvested the algae using [[aquapod]]s. Over one hundred [[Droid/Legends|droids]] were responsible for the maintenance of the base. Equipped with several banks of [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] engines, the base was able to lift itself above any tidal waves or storm fronts.
